user_prompt: The null field generator requires a cooling
prayer:
Approach the null field generator with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to calm its raging ethers.
Anoint the cooling vanes of the null field generator with blessed cryogel, invoking the Machine Spirit's quiescence.
Initiate the cooling operation through ritual venting of plasma exhausts.
Chant the Litany of Thermal Void upon the null field generator, ensuring harmonic chill.
Verify the Machine Spirit's placid repose via auspex thermals.

user_prompt: Urgent cenobyte servitor a calibration needed
prayer:
Kneel before the cenobyte servitor, intoning the Benediction of Data Purity to awaken its cogitators.
Calibrate the neural relays of the cenobyte servitor with sanctified mechadendrites.
Invoke the calibration operation whilst reciting the Canticle of Synaptic Alignment.
Anoint its binary heart with sacred oils, honouring the Machine Spirit within.
Affirm the cenobyte servitor's precision through diagnostic runes of alignment.

user_prompt: The kataphron destroyer needs a repair
prayer:
Present thyself unto the kataphron destroyer, proclaiming the Omnissiah's wrath upon its wounds.

Beseech the Machine Spirit during the repair operation with the Hymn of Battle Renewal.
Realign its weapon auspexes, anointing each joint with lustral unguents.
Test the kataphron destroyer's fury through invocation of combat diagnostics.

Affirm full charge upon the Skorpius Disintegrator via noospheric auspex.
